macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges to $79,480 Before Reversing to $77,800 Amid Oil Price Pressures
items.summary: Bitcoin hit a high of $79,480 but reversed sharply by 2% to around $77,800 after failing to break $80,000, influenced by rising oil prices fueling inflation fears and delaying Fed rate cuts. The price action sets up a macro test with $8 billion in options expiring soon.

items.title: Banks Lobby Aggressively to Block CLARITY Act on Stablecoin Yields Before Senate Deadline
items.summary: Banking organizations are running ads to pressure US lawmakers against the CLARITY Act, which could introduce stablecoin yields, as the Senate election window closes.

items.title: Oil Tanker Attacked After Crew Falls for Crypto Scam in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: An oil tanker was shot at after its crew followed a fake crypto-based clearance scam promising safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz, highlighting new maritime fraud risks.

items.title: Cardano Seeks $46.8 Million Community Approval for Bitcoin DeFi and Vision 2030
items.summary: Cardano's founding engineering lab proposes a nearly $50 million budget to develop Bitcoin DeFi integrations as part of its Vision 2030 roadmap, pending community vote.

items.title: XRP Leads Altcoins as Wall Street Shifts Beyond Bitcoin ETFs; Solana Follows
items.summary: XRP topped $55.39 million in flows while Solana reached $35.17 million amid fragile macro relief, though Litecoin saw no inflows as markets move past Bitcoin ETF hype.

items.title: Bitcoin Faces Volatility from $8B Options Expiry, Oil Over $100, and Fed Hold
items.summary: With oil prices above $100, a 99.5% chance of Fed rate hold, and $8 billion Bitcoin options expiring Friday, markets brace for potential volatility reset amid geopolitical tensions.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: MIT Researchers Develop EnergAIzer Tool for Rapid AI Power Prediction in Data Centers
items.summary: Researchers from MIT and MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab created EnergAIzer, a tool that predicts power consumption for AI workloads on various processors in seconds, addressing the projected 12% U.S. electricity use by data centers by 2028 due to AI growth.

items.title: 83% of Leaders Predict Data Infrastructure Limits for AI Growth Within Two Years
items.summary: Cockroach Labs' State of AI Infrastructure 2026 report reveals 98% of tech executives have moved AI projects to production, but 83% expect infrastructure overload soon, with AI's constant demand risking outages averaging 86 per year.

items.title: Lenovo Report: 70% of Enterprise AI Use is Uncontrolled, Posing Risks and Slowing ROI
items.summary: Lenovo's Work Reborn Report shows over 70% of employees use AI weekly, with up to one-third beyond IT oversight, creating hidden risks, higher costs, and slower returns on investment.

items.title: AI Becomes Central to Insurance Operations, Accelerating Underwriting and Fraud Detection
items.summary: Industry experts note AI is now core to insurance, transforming underwriting, claims processing, customer experience, and fraud detection amid rapid adoption.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nioh 3 Announced with PS5 Demo Available Now
items.summary: Team Ninja and Koei Tecmo revealed Nioh 3 during June's PlayStation State of Play, allowing soulslike fans to play a demo immediately on PS5. The full game is slated for 2026 release.

items.title: Bloodstained Sequel 'The Scarlet Engagement' Revealed
items.summary: ArtPlay announced a new Bloodstained game, The Scarlet Engagement, during the June PlayStation State of Play, diverging significantly from the original Ritual of the Night.

items.title: Final Fantasy Tactics - The Ivalice Chronicles Set for September Launch
items.summary: A remaster of Final Fantasy Tactics titled The Ivalice Chronicles was revealed at June's State of Play, launching in September.

items.title: Silent Hill f Release Date Advanced
items.summary: Silent Hill f is coming sooner than expected, as announced during the June PlayStation State of Play showcase.

items.title: Xbox Game Pass June 2025 Wave 1 Lineup Confirmed
items.summary: Microsoft revealed the full list of games joining Xbox Game Pass in the first wave of June 2025 ahead of the Xbox Games Showcase.

items.title: Original Four Mortal Kombat Games Coming to PS4 and PS5
items.summary: Players will soon access the original four Mortal Kombat titles on PS4 and PS5.

items.title: Helldivers 2 Unveils 'Force of Law' Warbond
items.summary: Helldivers 2 announced a new Force of Law Warbond, available soon for the cooperative shooter.

items.title: First Three Resident Evil Games Now on Steam
items.summary: The original Resident Evil titles and Breath of Fire IV are now available on Steam for PC players.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Apple Announces Leadership Transition: Tim Cook to Executive Chairman, John Ternus as Next CEO
items.summary: Apple revealed that Tim Cook will become executive chairman of the board, with John Ternus, senior vice president of Hardware Engineering, succeeding as CEO effective September 1, 2026.

items.title: Paystand Launches USDb, First Bitcoin-Aligned Stablecoin for B2B Payments
items.summary: Paystand introduced USDb, a stablecoin designed for the $100 trillion B2B economy, targeting accounts receivable/payable, payroll, and treasury workflows.

items.title: SpaceX Announces Merger with xAI and Plans for 1-Million AI Satellite Constellation
items.summary: SpaceX revealed a merger with xAI and sought FCC approval for a massive 1-million-satellite constellation to deliver sun-powered, space-cooled AI data services.
